# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent { label 'master' }
    
    stages {
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (fileExists('pom.xml')) {
                        sh 'mvn clean package -DskipTests'
                    } else if (fileExists('build.gradle')) {
                        sh './gradlew clean build -x test'
                    } else if (fileExists('package.json')) {
                        sh 'npm install'
                        sh 'npm run build'
                    } else {
                        echo 'No recognized build file found'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (fileExists('pom.xml')) {
                        sh 'mvn test'
                    } else if (fileExists('build.gradle')) {
                        sh './gradlew test'
                    } else if (fileExists('package.json')) {
                        sh 'npm test'
                    } else {
                        echo 'No recognized test framework found'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo 'Deploying to production...'
                    
                    if (fileExists('target/*.jar')) {
                        sh 'scp target/*.jar production-server:/opt/app/'
                        sh 'ssh production-server "systemctl restart app-service"'
                    } else if (fileExists('build/libs/*.jar')) {
                        sh 'scp build/libs/*.jar production-server:/opt/app/'
                        sh 'ssh production-server "systemctl restart app-service"'
                    } else if (fileExists('dist/')) {
                        sh 'rsync -avz dist/ production-server:/var/www/html/'
                        sh 'ssh production-server "systemctl restart nginx"'
                    } else {
                        sh 'rsync -avz . production-server:/opt/app/ --exclude .git'
                        sh 'ssh production-server "systemctl restart app-service"'
                    }
                    
                    echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline executed successfully on master node'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed'
        }
    }
}
